zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Talbot於大約1361年出生在英國英格蘭艾可雷利時，他的父親Richard Talbot23歲，母親Elizabeth Reade19歲。他於大約1388年與Thomasine Raleigh在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1449年享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Talbot于大约1361年出生在英国英格兰艾可雷利时，他的父亲Richard Talbot23岁，母亲Elizabeth Reade19岁。他于大约1388年与Thomasine Raleigh在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1449年享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Talbot was born about 1361, in Rayleigh, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Talbot, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Reade, was 19. He married Thomasine Raleigh about 1388, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1449, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Talbot est né environ 1361, à Rayleigh, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Talbot, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Reade, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Thomasine Raleigh environ 1388, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1449, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Talbot um 1361 in Rayleigh, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Talbot 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Reade 19. Er hat um 1388 in Devon, England Thomasine Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1449 im Alter von 89 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Talbot è nato il circa 1361 nel Rayleigh, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Talbot, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Reade, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Thomasine Raleigh circa 1388, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1449, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Talbotが約1361年にイギリスイギリスエセックスレイレイグで生まれた時，父Richard Talbotは23歳，母Elizabeth Readeは19歳であった。約1388年にイギリスデボンでThomasine Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1449年に89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Talbot(이)가 대략 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 라일리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Talbot(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Reade(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1388년 영국 데폰에서 Thomasine Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1449년 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Talbot nasceu aproximadamente 1361, em Rayleigh, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Talbot, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Reade, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasine Raleigh aproximadamente 1388, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1449, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Talbot родился около 1361 г. в местности реилиг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Talbot было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Reade, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Raleigh около 1388 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1449 г. в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Talbot nació aproximadamente 1361, en Rayleigh, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Talbot, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Reade, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thomasine Raleigh aproximadamente 1388, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1449, a la edad de 89 años.
